title: Pillowy Indulgent American Macaroni Casserole
description: A rich and comforting lacto-vegetarian casserole featuring english mustard and ferment-jang, perfect for a cold winter night. This dish is a fatty and indulgent treat that is sure to satisfy any craving.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until it is al dente.
In a large saucepan, whisk together the milk, english mustard, and ferment-jang.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook until it thickens.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the cheddar cheese until it is melted and smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, cheese sauce, and melted butter.
Stir until the macaroni is well coated with the cheese sauce.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the macaroni with additional shredded cheese and breadcrumbs if desired.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until it is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
